_comment: PRE-REGISTERED analysis decisions for the 3-arm x 20-seed study. Frozen BEFORE any evaluation result is computed (sweep launched 2026-07-16; no checkpoint has been evaluated). run_production_eval.py refuses to run confirmatory tests unless signed_off is true - set it only after supervisor agreement, and do not edit values afterwards. Any post-hoc change must be reported as such in the thesis.

equivalence_margins._comment: H2 (no clean-data degradation) TOST margins on mean paired difference, defended-vs-baseline, attack-off condition. PROPOSED values = 10% of the A-S clean-data anchor from the Phase-1 gate run; confirm with Dr Wen before sign-off.

common_adversary._comment: Every arm evaluated under attack faces the config-3 arm's adversary, paired by seed index (internal validity for H1).

periods_per_year_derivation: 2024_test cache: 275,141,175 msgs / 64 days = 4,299,081 msgs/day; at 100 msgs/step -> 42,991 steps/day x 252 trading days = 10,833,681 return-steps/year. Annualisation rescales Sharpe/Sortino uniformly across arms; paired contrasts are invariant to it.
label_materiality_note: 0.0 = any positive injected volume counts as an attack step (legacy behaviour, matches training).
training_schedule_note: All arms trained on chained quarters Q1->Q2->Q3 of 2024 (calendar-ordered curriculum, identical across arms); evaluation exclusively on the untouched 2024-10-01..2024-12-31 holdout.
